name: sync_fifo
core_function: Single-clock FIFO with write/read enables, full/empty flags, and optional count tracking.
algorithm: Use circular read/write pointers and a count register or extra pointer bit to distinguish full from
structure: Store payloads in a reg array addressed by circular write/read pointers.
Update count with combined read/write cases to avoid off-by-one flag bugs.
Allow simultaneous read and write when neither operation violates full/empty semantics.
Derive full and empty from registered count for simple timing.
